meaning: adj.奇特的,异样的vt.想象,设想,认为,爱好,自负n.爱好,迷恋,想象力
examples: Fancy! She's never been in a plane before.
Do you fancy a jar after work?
International shipping can be arranged if that 1960s pencil-leg sideboard really catches your fancy.
"You get so much more out of these dinners than at a fancy restaurant, " Kwon said.
